SUMMARY:
This paper reviews how heat is generated across a li-ion cell as well as the current research work being done on the four main battery thermal management types.

enriched_points.expanded_content: Conduct a thorough literature review to understand existing thermal management systems, highlighting advancements in battery thermal management, particularly in electric vehicles, from various scholarly articles.
Analyze current thermal management techniques, categorizing them into cooling and preheating systems, while evaluating their effectiveness and adaptation in different environmental conditions.
Evaluate challenges faced by existing thermal management systems, focusing on efficiency, reliability, and thermal performance, especially during rapid charging and extreme environmental conditions.
Identify recent innovations in thermal management technologies, including advanced materials and intelligent systems, that enhance performance and sustainability in electric vehicle applications.
